basic_details.job_title: District Judge Nayagarh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Steno, Junior Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The District Judge Nayagarh has officially announced the Group "C" Vacant Posts Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website https://nayagarh.dcourts.gov.in. Candidates aged between 18 and 42 years and holding qualifications such as +3 examination or equivalent with Diploma in Computer Application for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist and Stenographer Grade-III, and Matriculation with Revenue Inspector Training for Salaried Amin can submit their offline applications by 18 June 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and applicat

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years (as on 18.06.2026) Age relaxation for women and reserved categories shall be as per the provisions of the Act, Rules, Orders or Instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: For Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist and Stenographer Grade-III: +3 examination or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application. For Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent, Revenue Inspector Training.
qualification.details: Citizen of India +3 examination or equivalent Diploma in Computer Application Able to speak, read and write Oriya and have passed a test in Oriya equivalent to the M.E. Standard Minimum speed of 80 words per minute in Shorthand and 40 words per minute in Typewriting through computer system for the post of Stenographer Grade-III | Citizen of India Matriculation examination or equivalent Revenue Inspector Training Able to speak, read and write Oriya and have passed a test in Oriya equivalent to the M.E. Standard

salary_details.pay_scale: Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- - 81,100/- (Level-7); Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- - 63,200/- (Level-4); Salaried Amin: Rs. 21,700/- - 69,100/- (Level-5)
salary_details.details: Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- - 81,100/- (Level-7) Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- - 63,200/- (Level-4) Salaried Amin: Rs. 21,700/- - 69,100/- (Level-5)

selection_process: Written Examination Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva-Voce Test Shorthand & Typewriting Test (for Stenographer Grade-III)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Judge Nayagarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nayagarh.dcourts.gov.in/ or https://nayagarh.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Judge Nayagarh recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the District Judge Nayagarh Group "C" posts is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post, candidates must have completed a +3 examination or equivalent, possess a Diploma in Computer Application, and be able to speak, read, and write Oriya.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Stenographer Grade-III post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 42 years as of 18th June 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for women and reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Salaried Amin post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Salaried Amin post in the District Judge Nayagarh recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these Group "C" posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a Written Examination, Computer Science Test (Practical), and Viva-Voce Test. For Stenographer Grade-III, a Shorthand & Typewriting Test is also conducted.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Stenographer Grade-III post?
faq.answer: The Stenographer Grade-III post offers a salary in Level-7 of the Pay Matrix, ranging from Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or in person.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official websites of the District Judge Nayagarh, which are https://nayagarh.dcourts.gov.in/ or https://nayagarh.odisha.gov.in/.
